tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffold & dependencies
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Runnable Node project: deps, folders, shared config. Files: package.json, .gitignore, config.js, folder skeleton. Verify: `npm ls --depth=0 && node --test`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", ".gitignore", "config.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm ls --depth=0 && node --test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deps installed", "config.js requires cleanly", "node --test exits 0"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Step 0 — Headless-agent MCP-auth spike (USER-ORDERED GATE)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Prove whether a headless `claude -p` run reaches the Kiwi/lastminute MCP tools and returns a booking URL; record GREEN/RED verdict that decides Task 4's path. No page-styling task starts until the verdict is recorded. Files: scripts/spike-agent.sh, docs/superpowers/spikes/2026-07-09-headless-agent-mcp.md.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/spike-agent.sh", "docs/superpowers/spikes/2026-07-09-headless-agent-mcp.md"], "verifyCommand": "bash scripts/spike-agent.sh; grep -E 'VERDICT: (GREEN|RED)' docs/superpowers/spikes/2026-07-09-headless-agent-mcp.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["headless claude -p run executed and stdout captured", "verdict GREEN or RED recorded with pasted evidence", "resulting Task 4 path (A or B) stated"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "one-before-the-rest", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Vendor & adapt the Google Flights scraper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Copy backend scraper into lib/, repoint output to our .captures via config; never write to the read-only backend. Files: lib/gflights.js, lib/search.js, test/gflights.test.js. Verify: `node --test test/gflights.test.js`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/gflights.js", "lib/search.js", "test/gflights.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "node --test test/gflights.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gflights.js verbatim copy", "search.js writes to our .captures via config", "parseAria test passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Pure normalize + merge + rank module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure module: normalize Google rows + agent options to shared schema, ceiling filter, dedupe, rank by USD, source diversity, top 5. Files: lib/merge.js, test/merge.test.js. Verify: `node --test test/merge.test.js`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/merge.js", "test/merge.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "node --test test/merge.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["normalizeGoogleRow converts+marks+builds url", "mergeOptions filters/ranks/caps at 5", "source diversity guaranteed", "tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Agent search runner (Kiwi + lastminute via claude -p)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** runAgentSearch(query): path A spawns headless claude -p; path B (spike RED) short-circuits to a marked status. Pure extractOptions parser unit-tested. Files: lib/agentSearch.js, test/agentSearch.test.js. Verify: `node --test test/agentSearch.test.js`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/agentSearch.js", "test/agentSearch.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "node --test test/agentSearch.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["extractOptions robust parse", "runAgentSearch path A spawns claude -p", "RED verdict short-circuits", "tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Static server foundation, theme, marquee & screenshot harness
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Static server serving public/, pink CJK-capable theme, reusable trilingual marquee, sample-results fixture, headless Playwright screenshot script. Files: server.js, public/styles.css, public/marquee.js, .captures/sample-results.json, scripts/shot.mjs. Verify: `node scripts/shot.mjs about:blank /tmp/blank.png && ls -l /tmp/blank.png`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server.js", "public/styles.css", "public/marquee.js", ".captures/sample-results.json", "scripts/shot.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "node scripts/shot.mjs about:blank /tmp/blank.png && ls -l /tmp/blank.png", "acceptanceCriteria": ["static server serves public + 404s", "shot.mjs writes a PNG", "buildMarquee renders 3 phrases scrolling", "sample fixture valid"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Landing page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Landing — pink rotating globe + trilingual marquee + CTA to /search.html; impeccable polish. Files: public/index.html. Verify: `node scripts/shot.mjs http://localhost:5173/ /tmp/landing.png` + DOM assert {globe:1,phrases:6,btn:'/search.html'}.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/index.html"], "verifyCommand": "node scripts/shot.mjs http://localhost:5173/ /tmp/landing.png", "acceptanceCriteria": ["globe + marquee + CTA to /search.html render", "screenshot shows globe + marquee", "impeccable polish applied"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Search form page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Form — origin/dest/depart/optional-return + validation, POST /search, redirect to loading with id. Files: public/search.html, public/app.js. Verify: DOM assert empty-submit shows validation message.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/search.html", "public/app.js"], "verifyCommand": "node --test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["four fields present", "validation blocks empty submit", "valid submit posts + redirects with id"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Search orchestration routes on the server
tasks.description:
**Goal:** POST /search (async job: Google scraper + agent parallel, merge, write results.json) + GET /status?id=. Guard listen with require.main. Files: server.js, test/server.test.js. Verify: `node --test test/server.test.js`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server.js", "test/server.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "node --test test/server.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST /search returns id (202)", "job merges sources + writes results.json", "GET /status transitions pending->done/error", "400 on missing field"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Loading page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Loading — marquee central animation + honest status; poll GET /status?id=, redirect to results on done, error state on error. Files: public/loading.html. Verify: DOM assert with mocked done redirects to results.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/loading.html"], "verifyCommand": "node --test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["polls /status by id", "marquee + honest status while pending", "redirect on done, error state on error"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Results page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Results — up to 5 cards (price/airline/route+stops/duration/times/source tag/Book link), ~ approx markers, empty/error state. Files: public/results.html, public/sample-results.json. Verify: DOM assert vs fixture {cards:5,books:5,approx:1}.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/results.html", "public/sample-results.json"], "verifyCommand": "node --test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renders up to 5 cards with all fields + source tag + Book link", "approx prices marked with ~", "empty/error state graceful"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: End-to-end integration & honest-states pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real e2e run landing→form→loading→results with ≥1 real booking link; honest states per spike path; full suite passes; final impeccable consistency pass. Files: e2e-notes doc + small integration fixes. Verify: `node --test` + captured results screenshot.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/e2e-notes-2026-07-09.md"], "verifyCommand": "node --test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["real e2e run produces populated results with working booking link", "honest states correct per spike path", "full test suite passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
